content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.pnas.org/doi/abs/10.1073/pnas.2100163118", "source_title": "Permafrost carbon feedbacks threaten global climate goals", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Dickinson, University of California, Los Angeles, CA, and approved March 9, 2021 (received for review January 5, 2021)\nRapid Arctic warming ...", "direct_quote": "Dickinson, University of California, Los Angeles, CA, and approved March 9, 2021 (received for review January 5, 2021)\nRapid Arctic warming has intensified northern wildfires and is thawing carbon-rich permafrost.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Carbon emissions from permafrost thaw and Arctic wildfires, which are not fully accounted for in global emissions budgets, will greatly redu...", "direct_quote": "Carbon emissions from permafrost thaw and Arctic wildfires, which are not fully accounted for in global emissions budgets, will greatly reduce the amount of greenhouse gases that humans can emit to remain below 1.5 \u00b0C or 2 \u00b0C.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In December 2020, more than 70 countries announced more ambitious nationally determined contributions as part of their Paris Agreement commi...", "direct_quote": "In December 2020, more than 70 countries announced more ambitious nationally determined contributions as part of their Paris Agreement commitments; however, the carbon budgets that informed these commitments were incomplete, as they do not fully acco", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
